title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Pfizer India Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Pfizer India Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
We at Pfizer India Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Medical Officer based out of Ahmedabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Pfizer India Digital Technologies:
Pfizer India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pfizer India Digital Technologies!
